description: BI Triage Operator — Power Automate flow template. Triggers on new email to shared mailbox, calls Claude API, replies with triage decision.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Your Anthropic API key. Store in Azure Key Vault or Power Automate environment variables — never hardcode.

SHARED_MAILBOX.description: The shared mailbox address that receives BI requests (e.g., bi-requests@yourcompany.com)

OPERATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT.description: Paste the combined contents of identity.md + rules.md + config.md here.

CLAUDE_MODEL.description: Claude model to use for triage.

REPLY_TO_EMAIL.description: Set to true to reply to the original email thread. Set to false to only log to Teams/SharePoint.

TEAMS_CHANNEL_ID.description: Optional. Teams channel ID to post triage decisions. Leave empty to skip.

INTERNAL_DOMAIN.description: Your company email domain for filtering internal senders (e.g., yourcompany.com)

trigger.type: When a new email arrives in a shared mailbox (V2)

Filter_internal_senders.description: Only process emails from internal senders. Prevents spam and auto-replies from triggering triage.

Compose_user_message.description: Build the formatted request string to send to Claude.

Call_Claude_API.description: POST the request to the Claude API with operator files as system context.

Parse_Claude_response.description: Extract the triage decision card text from the Claude API response.

Extract_decision_card.description: Pull the triage decision text from the parsed response.

Reply_to_email.description: Send the triage decision card back to the original email thread.

body.comment:
TRIAGE DECISION — automated via Analytics & Reporting Triage Operator

@{outputs('Extract_decision_card')}

---
This decision was generated automatically. Reply to this thread with questions or to provide additional context.

Post_to_Teams_if_configured.description: Optionally post the triage decision to a Teams channel for team visibility.

Post_Teams_message.type: Post message in a chat or channel

setup_instructions: 1. In Power Automate, go to My Flows > Import > Import Package and upload this file.
2. Map the M365 connection to your account.
3. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in environment variables (not inline — use Azure Key Vault for production).
4. Set SHARED_MAILBOX to the inbox where BI requests arrive.
5. Set INTERNAL_DOMAIN to your company's email domain.
6. Replace OPERATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT with the combined text from identity.md + rules.md + config.md.
7. Optionally set TEAMS_CHANNEL_ID to also post decisions to a Teams channel.
8. Save and test by sending a sample request email to the shared mailbox.
9. Check the flow run history to confirm the Claude API call succeeded and the reply was sent.
